info.title: Disco API
info.description:
Disco finds novel, statistically validated patterns in tabular data that correlation analysis, LLMs, and hypothesis-driven approaches miss. Each pattern is validated on hold-out data with FDR-corrected p-values and checked against academic literature with citations.

## Agent workflow

**Step 1 — Get an API key** (once):
- `POST /api/signup` with `{"email": "..."}` → sends a 6-digit code
- `POST /api/signup/verify` with `{"email": "...", "code": "..."}` → returns `{"key": "disco_..."}`
- Use this key as `Authorization: Bearer disco_...` for all subsequent requests

**Step 2 — Estimate cost** (optional but recommended):
- `POST /api/estimate` with file size, column count, depth, visibility
- Returns credit cost and time estimate

**Step 3 — Upload data** (pick one):
- *From URL:* `POST /api/data/upload/from-url` with `{"url": "https://..."}` → returns `file` and `columns`
- *Direct (base64):* `POST /api/data/upload/direct` with `{"fileName": "data.csv", "content": "<base64>"}` → returns `file` and `columns`. Max 50MB.
- *Presign flow (for large files):* `POST /api/data/upload/presign` → PUT file to `uploadUrl` → `POST /api/data/upload/finalize`

**Step 4 — Run analysis:**
- `POST /api/run-analysis` with `file`, `columns`, and `targetColumn` from step 3 → returns `{"run_id": "..."}`

**Step 5 — Poll for results:**
- `GET /api/runs/{run_id}/results` — poll every 10s until `status` is `"completed"` (time varies with dataset size and depth)
- Response includes `patterns[]` with conditions, p-values, effect sizes, novelty scores, and citations

## Billing

Public runs are free. If the user needs more credits or a paid plan, send them to https://disco.leap-labs.com/account to upgrade.

## Authentication

`disco_` API keys via `Authorization: Bearer disco_...` header. Get a key via signup or at https://disco.leap-labs.com/developers.

## SDK

`pip install discovery-engine-api` — [Full docs](https://disco.leap-labs.com/llms-full.txt)

get.description: Returns analysis results including patterns, p-values, novelty scores, and citations. Poll until status is "completed". If "failed", check error_message.
List all API keys for the current user. Key values are not returned — only metadata.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Api Keys Get

delete.description: Permanently revoke an API key. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: key_id

schema.description: The ID of the API key to delete
schema.title: Key Id

parameters.description: The ID of the API key to delete

get.description: Returns the current authenticated user's profile and session information.
Returns all organizations the current user belongs to. Use the returned `id` values as the `X-Organization-ID` header for endpoints that require it.
Returns all analysis runs for the current user with their current status, job info, and report links. Use this to monitor running analyses or find past results.

Public endpoint — no authentication required. Returns all available subscription plans with pricing, credit allowances, and feature lists. Credits cost $0.10 each. Credit packs of 100 ($10) are available on all plans. Use this to show users their options before they sign up or upgrade.

post.summary: Estimate credit cost for an analysis
post.description: Estimate the credit cost of an analysis before running it. Returns cost, limits, and (if authenticated) whether you have sufficient credits. No auth required.

get.description: Returns current plan, available credits (subscription + purchased), payment method status, and Stripe identifiers. Use this to check credit balance before running a private analysis.

post.description: Purchase Disco credits using a stored payment method. Credits cost $0.10 each, sold in packs of 100 ($10/pack). Requires a payment method on file (attach one via `POST /api/account/payment-method`). Returns 402 if no payment method is attached.

Subscribe to or change your Disco plan. Available plans: Explorer (free, 10 credits/mo), Researcher ($49, 50 credits/mo), Team ($199, 200 credits/mo). Paid plans require a payment method on file. Credits roll over on paid plans. Use `GET /api/plans` to see all plan details.
Zero-touch signup. Sends a 6-digit code to the email. Follow up with POST /api/signup/verify to get an API key. Returns 409 if already registered.

post.summary: Verify email and complete account creation
post.description:
Complete signup by submitting the verification code sent to the email address. Creates the account and returns a ready-to-use API key.

Codes expire after 15 minutes and can only be used once.
Returns a presigned URL for uploading a file directly to storage. Use the returned uploadUrl to PUT your file, then call /api/data/upload/finalize.

contentType.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. text/csv)

uploadUrl.description: PUT your file to this URL

post.description: After uploading to the presigned URL, call this to process the file. Returns columns and metadata needed for /api/run-analysis.
Upload a file as base64 in a JSON body. Handles storage and processing in one step. Max 50MB. For larger files, use presign flow or from-url.

fileName.description: File name with extension (e.g. data.csv, dataset.xlsx)

200.description: Processed file metadata and columns (same as /api/data/upload/finalize)

413.description: File too large (max 50MB for direct upload)

post.description: Download a file from a URL and process it. Combines presign + upload + finalize in one step. Returns columns and metadata for /api/run-analysis.

url.description: Public URL of the dataset to download

post.description: Send a verification code to an existing account's email. Follow up with POST /api/login/verify to get an API key.

404.description: No account found for this email

post.description: Submit the code sent to email. Returns a new API key. Codes expire after 15 minutes.

Attach a Stripe payment method to your account. The payment method must be tokenized via Stripe's API first (using the `stripe_publishable_key` from `POST /api/api-keys` or `GET /api/account`) — card details never touch Disco. Required before purchasing credits or subscribing to a paid plan.
Submit an uploaded dataset for analysis. Returns a run_id to poll via GET /api/runs/{run_id}/results.

file.description: File metadata from upload/finalize or upload/from-url

columns.description: Column metadata from upload/finalize or upload/from-url

targetColumn.description: Name of the column to predict/explain

isPublic.description: Public runs are free but results are published

useLlms.description: Enable LLM summaries, literature context, novelty assessment. Slower and more expensive. Public runs always use LLMs.

run_id.description: Poll GET /api/runs/{run_id}/results until status is completed

on_file.title: On File
on_file.description: Whether a payment method is attached

stripe_publishable_key.title: Stripe Publishable Key
stripe_publishable_key.description: Stripe publishable key for client-side payment method tokenization

last_used_at.title: Last Used At
last_used_at.description: Last time this key was used

card_last4.title: Card Last4
card_last4.description: Last 4 digits of the attached card

url.title: Url
url.description: Direct URL to this dashboard page

description.title: Description
description.description: What the user will find on this page

summary.description: AI-generated overview with key insights and novel findings

patterns.description: Full list of discovered patterns with statistics, citations, and interactive visualisations

features.description: Feature importance rankings, column statistics, and correlations

territory.description: Interactive 3D map showing how patterns select different regions of the data

sufficient.title: Sufficient
sufficient.description: Whether available credits cover the estimated cost

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: Credit cost for this analysis (0 for public runs)

free_alternative.title: Free Alternative
free_alternative.description: Whether a free public alternative exists

max_analysis_depth.title: Max Analysis Depth
max_analysis_depth.description: Maximum depth iterations for this dataset

num_columns.title: Num Columns
num_columns.description: Number of columns in the dataset

use_llms.title: Use Llms
use_llms.description: Slower and more expensive (5x credit multiplier), but you get smarter pre-processing, literature context and novelty assessment. Public runs always use LLMs regardless of this setting.

target_change_direction.title: Target Change Direction
target_change_direction.description: 'max' or 'min' — which extreme this pattern drives

support_count.title: Support Count
support_count.description: Number of rows matching this pattern

support_percentage.title: Support Percentage
support_percentage.description: Fraction of dataset matching this pattern

novelty_explanation.title: Novelty Explanation
novelty_explanation.description: Why this pattern is novel or known

tier.title: Tier
tier.description: Plan tier ID (free_tier, tier_1, tier_2, enterprise)

price_usd.title: Price Usd
price_usd.description: Monthly price in USD (null for enterprise)

monthly_credits.title: Monthly Credits
monthly_credits.description: Credits included per month (null for enterprise)

is_org_level.title: Is Org Level
is_org_level.description: Whether subscription is at the organization level

credit_price_usd.title: Credit Price Usd
credit_price_usd.description: Price per individual credit in USD

credit_pack_price_usd.title: Credit Pack Price Usd
credit_pack_price_usd.description: Price per credit pack in USD

report_id.title: Report Id
report_id.description: Report UUID (null if not yet completed)

report_url.title: Report Url
report_url.description: Shareable URL to the interactive web report

dashboard_urls.description: Direct links to each dashboard page with descriptions of what's on each page

total_rows.title: Total Rows
total_rows.description: Number of rows in the dataset

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address for the new account

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name (optional — defaults to email local part)

key.title: Key
key.description: API key (shown only once — store it securely)

monthly_credits.title: Monthly Credits
monthly_credits.description: Credits included per month on new plan
